title: Aathaa Nee Illaina Lyrics Pandi
stanzas:
aathaa nee illaina
aadharikka yaar irukkaa
pudhu seela vaangi
vandhen unna podhacha
idam paarpadharkkaa

eththanai piravi ini
un mugathil naan mulikka
enga poi theduvannamma
pattakadana naan adaikka

naan kanda kanavula
nandhavanam erinjadhu
andha vanam nee endru
appurama therinjadhu

kashta patta kaalathilum
kala kalanu siricha
kandaangi selayila
en kanneera thodacha

thiruneera poosinakkai
thiruveeraa aanadho
thirumbi vandhu
paakkurappo dheivam
engu ponadho..

enna pola paavi yaarum
inga vandhum porakkala
kolli vaikkum kudupinaiyum
enaku ingae kedaikkala

ammaa illaa kadavul appo
ammaanu thaan azhattum

ammaa illaa kadavul appo
ammaanu thaan azhattum

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aathaa Nee Illaina from the movie Pandi is a heartfelt melody that resonates deeply with its emotional lyrics and soulful composition by Srikanth Deva. Sung by the iconic Deva, this song beautifully captures the essence of familial love and devotion. Experience the touching harmony and poignant storytelling that makes this track a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: Aathaa Nee Illaina Song Lyrics Pandi
Mother, if you are not here, who will support me? I bought a new saree to dress you and see your joy.
How many lifetimes must I endure to see your face again? Where should I search for you to repay my debts?
In the dreams I saw, the garden was destroyed; later, I realized that garden was you.
Even during tough times, you smiled brightly; you wiped my tears with the edge of your saree.
In my final breath, I thought of you as my mother.
Even in death, you hid your pain to avoid upsetting your child.
When you applied holy ash, you became divine; when you returned, it felt like God had disappeared.
No sinner like me has ever been born here; I couldn't even find a shelter to rest.
The tears that fell from my eyes are a complaint to God.
When there is no mother, even God will cry out for her.
The tears that fell from my eyes are a complaint to God.
When there is no mother, even God will cry out for her.
